question: Where is BYV located?
answer: BYV is headquartered in Dhaka, Bangladesh (Bashundhara R/A). However, we operate as a cloud-first engineering collective, serving clients across North America, Europe, and Asia with 24/7 overlap capabilities.

question: What makes BYV different from other agencies?
answer: Unlike traditional outsourcing shops that rely on junior freelancers and templates, BYV is a collective of Senior Team Leads and Computer Science graduates from top-tier firms. We build custom, enterprise-grade architectures (Next.js, LangGraph) focused on scalability and security, not just quick fixes.

question: Do you work with clients in different time zones?
answer: Yes. Our engineering teams operate in shifts to ensure significant overlap with US (EST/PST) and European (CET/GMT) time zones for meetings and deployment support.

question: What is your pricing model?
answer: We offer two models: 1. Project-Based (Fixed Price) for defined scopes like building an MVP or Website. 2. Retainer (Dedicated Team) for long-term AI R&D and continuous development. We do not charge hourly rates to avoid inefficiency incentives.

question: How much does a custom AI Agent cost?
answer: Simple RAG chatbots start around $2,500. Complex Autonomous Agents (that integrate with CRM/Email) typically range from $5,000 to $15,000 depending on the complexity of the logic and data integration.

question: How much does a Next.js website cost?
answer: Enterprise-grade marketing platforms typically range from $3,000 to $8,000. This includes SEO optimization, CMS integration, and high-performance server architecture.

question: Do you provide post-launch support?
answer: Yes. We offer 'Continuous Intelligence' maintenance packages. This ensures your software stays secure, your servers stay online, and your AI models are periodically updated with new data.

question: Is my data safe with you?
answer: Security is our priority. We are SOC-2 alignment ready. We use AES-256 encryption, strictly limit access via Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), and can deploy on-premise for highly sensitive clients. We never use client data to train public models.

question: Do you sign NDAs?
answer: Yes. We sign strict Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs) with all corporate clients before the first line of code is written. Your Intellectual Property (IP) belongs 100% to you.

question: What technologies do you use?
answer: We use a modern, type-safe stack: Next.js (React) for frontend, Python (FastAPI) for backend, PostgreSQL/Vector DBs for data, and LangGraph for AI orchestration. We deploy on AWS or Vercel.

question: Can you fix my existing legacy website?
answer: We specialize in modernization. We can audit your legacy PHP/WordPress site and migrate it to a modern, high-performance Next.js architecture, often improving speed by 300%.

question: Do you have experience in the Garment Industry?
answer: Yes. We have specific domain expertise in RMG (Ready-Made Garments), building production dashboards, inventory tracking systems, and compliance bots for factory floors.

question: How do I start a project?
answer: The process starts with a Technical Discovery Call. Please provide your email address in this chat, and our Principal Architect will reach out to schedule a 30-minute audit.

question: Can I see your portfolio?
answer: We can share specific case studies relevant to your industry during our consultation call. Due to strict NDAs with enterprise clients, we do not publish all codebases publicly.

question: Do you outsource your work?
answer: No. All engineering is done in-house by our full-time team in Dhaka. We maintain strict quality control and do not subcontract to unknown third parties.

question: What happens if I am not satisfied?
answer: We work in Agile Sprints with weekly demos. You see progress every week. If the direction isn't right, we pivot immediately. We focus on long-term partnerships, not hit-and-run projects.

question: Can you integrate AI into my existing CRM?
answer: Yes. Our agents can connect to Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, and other CRMs via API to automate data entry and lead management.
